channel.title: Meziantou.net on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Meziantou.net on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Creating case-sensitive folders on Windows using C#
item.description: Windows has supported case-sensitive file operations for a long time, but it was not easily accessible or enabled by default. Since Windows 10 (version 1803), it is possible to enable case sensitivity on a per-directory basis. This feature was introduced primarily to support the Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL), but it can be used by any application. In this post, we'll see how to enable case sensitivity… Link to article: https://www.
